project_type: Full-stack AI chat app: Next.js 15 frontend + FastAPI backend with Vertex AI Gemini
test_framework: jest with jsdom (frontend), pytest with mocks (backend)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm lint in frontend/ to check TypeScript types and ESLint rules. 2. Run pnpm build in frontend/ to validate production build. 3. Run pytest in backend/ to run backend tests.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && pnpm install; cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET. Node 22, pnpm, Python 3.11. Vertex AI credentials not available in sandbox so backend tests rely on mocks.
contribution_requirements: Commit changes to git but do NOT push.
key_patterns: Backend: AgentBase.generate() wraps model.generate_content in asyncio.to_thread with timeout. Orchestrator.execute() calls specialist agents and returns {content, agent, metadata}. WebSocket handler in main.py sends JSON frames: {type, content, agent}. Frontend: useChatSocket hook manages messages state, WebSocketClient emits 'message' events with ResponsePayload type. MessageBubble does client-side typewriter effect for streaming:true messages.
directory_structure: frontend/ - Next.js 15 app with App Router. frontend/hooks/ - custom hooks including useChatSocket. frontend/lib/ - utilities including ws.ts WebSocket client. frontend/components/chat/ - chat UI components. backend/app/ - FastAPI app. backend/app/agents/ - AI agent classes with base.py and orchestrator.py. backend/tests/ - pytest test files.
